allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, npx, py, python, dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Get-Process powershell, pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $pid } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "cleaned")

PowerShell(Start-Job -Name secugram -ScriptBlock { & "C:\\Users\\Asus\\Documents\\New project\\secugram_landing_page\\.claude\\serve.ps1" } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" }; Receive-Job -Name secugram -Keep | Select-Object -First 5)
